LandingPe.metaDescription: Portfolio transformation, EBITDA leverage, execution capability, leadership acceleration post-deal.
LandingPe.title: Private equity
LandingPe.lede: Value thesis and tempo: the bottleneck is often leadership that holds multiple lines—not technology demos.
LandingPe.body: Succession, assessment, scaling: where EBITDA depends on top decisions and initiatives that cross lines without fragmenting.
LandingPe.closing: Constrained exchange to frame mandate and confidentiality.

LandingEti.metaDescription: Light structures, fuzzy mandate, key-person dependency—transformation without an oversized project apparatus.
LandingEti.title: Dense organizations
LandingEti.lede: Operational bottlenecks unnamed; briefs that say “AI” before naming who owns what.
LandingEti.body: Clarify mandate when the firm still runs informally—then hire who can hold internal friction.
LandingEti.closing: First contact to see if context fits the scope.

LandingTop500.metaDescription: Matrix complexity, political sensitivity, transformation in the spotlight, organizational inertia.
LandingTop500.title: Large enterprises
LandingTop500.lede: Transformation is visible before it is real: internal resistance, competing agendas, media exposure.
LandingTop500.body: High-exposure profiles, committee trade-offs: leadership that holds politics without sacrificing execution.
LandingTop500.closing: Qualify fit with a limited-volume practice.

LandingInternational.metaDescription: HQ ambition versus local truth, operating translation, European alignment complexity.
LandingInternational.title: International subsidiaries
LandingInternational.lede: Without a mandate translated where execution lives, the directive stays symbolic.
LandingInternational.body: Multi-context Europe: accountability, decision languages, local credibility.
